query: scratched dusty damaged old film negative photo
message: sub:film_artifacts/scratch_decay — anti_aesthetic — scratches, dust spots, chemical stains, tintype/wet-plate degradation

response.objective_caption: A black and white photograph of a human hand silhouetted against a wire-reinforced glass window. A dark horizontal window frame bisects the pane, and bright exterior light diffuses through the glass, revealing its embedded wire mesh grid pattern. The hand rests in the lower left corner with fingers splayed against the surface.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A black and white photograph of a human hand pressed against a grimy, weathered wire-reinforced glass window, exhibiting decay and degradation through visible dirt, scattered dark spots, and a damaged corner near the hand. Exposure extremes render the hand as a heavily underexposed silhouette with crushed blacks against the bright background, creating atmospheric distress and an oppressive mood of confinement and isolation.
